title: Initial debugging support for circt
body:
Hello,

This patch adds preliminary debugging support to firrtl + circt. It is more of a working prototype than an actual PR. 

Below is an example where we can step through the code in the vending machine example (from the official Chisel3 repo). The IDE interacts with the [hgdb](https://github.com/Kuree/hgdb) runtime, which communicates with the underlying simulator (Xcelium in this case).

![vscode](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6099149/152451684-276f1da2-9fd4-4ba5-956d-9a1aad70da49.png)


## Symbol tracking
There are a couple changes I have to make to the Firrtl dialect to track the naming changes. Mostly whenever a new op is created from an symbol op, I add a new debugging attribute that encodes the original name to the new op. For instance, when a bundle is flattened e.g. `io {a, b}`, each new wire op is named based on its original identifier e.g. `io.a and `io.b`. During the debugging session, the runtime will assemble these information together and reconstruct the original structure, as shown in the screenshot.

## Symbol table generation
I opted for Json-based format since it’s more human readable and LLVM already has a nice serializer. The Json schema can be found [here](https://github.com/Kuree/hgdb/blob/master/include/schema.json). The main idea is that each statement is nested inside a statement block, which encodes source location. This PR contains a simple implementation of symbol generation. For now we’re focusing on assignments, since they’re the most common and can be used to implement watch points as well.

Here is the firrtl input.

```
circuit SimpleVendingMachineTester :
  module ImplicitStateVendingMachine :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : Reset
    output io : { flip nickel : UInt<1>, flip dime : UInt<1>, dispense : UInt<1>}

    node _T = and(io.nickel, io.dime) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:22]
    node _T_1 = eq(_T, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:10]
    node _T_2 = asUInt(reset) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
    node _T_3 = eq(_T_2, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
    when _T_3 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
      assert(clock, _T_1, UInt<1>("h1"), "") : assert @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
      node _T_4 = eq(_T_1, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
      when _T_4 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
        printf(clock, UInt<1>("h1"), "Assertion failed: Only one of nickel or dime can be input at a time!\n    at SimpleVendingMachine.scala:19 assert(!(io.nickel && io.dime), \"Only one of nickel or dime can be input at a time!\")\n") : printf @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 19:9]
    reg value : UInt<3>, clock with :
      reset => (reset, UInt<3>("h0")) @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 11:22]
    wire incValue : UInt<3>
    incValue <= UInt<3>("h0")
    node doDispense = geq(value, UInt<3>("h4")) @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 13:26]
    when doDispense : @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 15:20]
      value <= UInt<1>("h0") @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 16:11]
    else :
      node _value_T = add(value, incValue) @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 18:20]
      node _value_T_1 = tail(_value_T, 1) @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 18:20]
      value <= _value_T_1 @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 18:11]
    when io.nickel : @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 21:19]
      incValue <= UInt<1>("h1") @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 21:30]
    when io.dime : @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 22:17]
      incValue <= UInt<2>("h2") @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 22:28]
    io.dispense <= doDispense @[ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala 24:15]

  module SimpleVendingMachineTester :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : UInt<1>
    output io : { }

    inst dut of ImplicitStateVendingMachine @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 73:19]
    dut.clock <= clock
    dut.reset <= reset
    reg cycle : UInt<4>, clock with :
      reset => (reset, UInt<4>("h0")) @[Counter.scala 62:40]
    wire done : UInt<1>
    done <= UInt<1>("h0")
    when UInt<1>("h1") : @[Counter.scala 120:16]
      node wrap_wrap = eq(cycle, UInt<4>("h9")) @[Counter.scala 74:24]
      node _wrap_value_T = add(cycle, UInt<1>("h1")) @[Counter.scala 78:24]
      node _wrap_value_T_1 = tail(_wrap_value_T, 1) @[Counter.scala 78:24]
      cycle <= _wrap_value_T_1 @[Counter.scala 78:15]
      when wrap_wrap : @[Counter.scala 88:20]
        cycle <= UInt<1>("h0") @[Counter.scala 88:28]
      done <= wrap_wrap @[Counter.scala 120:23]
    when done : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:14]
      node _T = bits(reset, 0, 0) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:20]
      node _T_1 = eq(_T, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:20]
      when _T_1 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:20]
        stop(clock, UInt<1>("h1"), 0) : stop @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:20]
      node _T_2 = bits(reset, 0, 0) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:28]
      node _T_3 = eq(_T_2, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:28]
      when _T_3 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:28]
        stop(clock, UInt<1>("h1"), 0) : stop_1 @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 76:28]
    wire nickelInputs : UInt<1>[10] @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[0] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[1] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[2] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[3] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[4] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[5] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[6] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[7] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[8] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    nickelInputs[9] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 78:29]
    wire dimeInputs : UInt<1>[10] @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[0] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[1] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[2] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[3] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[4] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[5] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[6] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[7] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[8] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    dimeInputs[9] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 79:27]
    wire expected : UInt<1>[10] @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[0] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[1] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[2] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[3] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[4] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[5] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[6] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[7] <= UInt<1>("h1") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[8] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    expected[9] <= UInt<1>("h0") @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 80:25]
    dut.io.nickel <= nickelInputs[cycle] @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 82:17]
    dut.io.dime <= dimeInputs[cycle] @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 83:15]
    node _T_4 = eq(dut.io.dispense, expected[cycle]) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:26]
    node _T_5 = bits(reset, 0, 0) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
    node _T_6 = eq(_T_5, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
    when _T_6 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
      assert(clock, _T_4, UInt<1>("h1"), "") : assert @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
      node _T_7 = eq(_T_4, UInt<1>("h0")) @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
      when _T_7 : @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
        printf(clock, UInt<1>("h1"), "Assertion failed\n    at SimpleVendingMachine.scala:84 assert(dut.io.dispense === expected(cycle))\n") : printf @[SimpleVendingMachine.scala 84:9]
```

Here is the Json output (`--disable-opt` is used).

```
{"generator":"circt","table":[{"column":10,"line":3,"name":"ImplicitStateVendingMachine","scope":[{"column":9,"filename":"SimpleVendingMachine.scala","line":0,"scope":[{"column":9,"line":19,"type":"none"}],"type":"block"},{"column":22,"filename":"ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala","line":11,"scope":[{"column":22,"line":11,"type":"none"},{"column":22,"condition":"reset","line":11,"scope":[{"column":22,"line":11,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"value","rtl":true,"value":"value"}}],"type":"block"},{"column":22,"condition":"!reset","line":11,"scope":[{"column":11,"line":18,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"value","rtl":true,"value":"value"}}],"type":"block"}],"type":"block"},{"column":29,"filename":"ImplicitStateVendingMachine.scala","line":0,"scope":[{"column":29,"line":22,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"incValue","rtl":true,"value":"incValue"}}],"type":"block"}],"type":"module","variables":[{"name":"io.nickel","rtl":true,"value":"io_nickel"},{"name":"io.dime","rtl":true,"value":"io_dime"},{"name":"io.dispense","rtl":true,"value":"io_dispense"},{"name":"value","rtl":true,"value":"value"},{"name":"incValue","rtl":true,"value":"incValue"}]},{"column":10,"instances":[{"module":"ImplicitStateVendingMachine","name":"dut"}],"line":37,"name":"SimpleVendingMachineTester","scope":[{"column":40,"filename":"Counter.scala","line":60,"scope":[{"column":40,"line":60,"type":"none"},{"column":40,"condition":"reset","line":60,"scope":[{"column":40,"line":60,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"cycle","rtl":true,"value":"cycle"}}],"type":"block"},{"column":40,"condition":"!reset","line":60,"scope":[{"column":28,"line":86,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"cycle","rtl":true,"value":"cycle"}}],"type":"block"}],"type":"block"},{"column":24,"filename":"Counter.scala","line":0,"scope":[{"column":24,"line":118,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"done","rtl":true,"value":"done"}}],"type":"block"},{"column":29,"filename":"SimpleVendingMachine.scala","line":0,"scope":[{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.0","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_0"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.1","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_1"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.2","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_2"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.3","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_3"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.4","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_4"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.5","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_5"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.6","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_6"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.7","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_7"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.8","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_8"}},{"column":29,"line":78,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"nickelInputs.9","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_9"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.0","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_0"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.1","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_1"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.2","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_2"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.3","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_3"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.4","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_4"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.5","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_5"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.6","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_6"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.7","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_7"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.8","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_8"}},{"column":29,"line":79,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"dimeInputs.9","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_9"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.0","rtl":true,"value":"expected_0"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.1","rtl":true,"value":"expected_1"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.2","rtl":true,"value":"expected_2"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.3","rtl":true,"value":"expected_3"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.4","rtl":true,"value":"expected_4"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.5","rtl":true,"value":"expected_5"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.6","rtl":true,"value":"expected_6"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.7","rtl":true,"value":"expected_7"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.8","rtl":true,"value":"expected_8"}},{"column":29,"line":80,"type":"assign","variable":{"name":"expected.9","rtl":true,"value":"expected_9"}},{"column":21,"line":76,"type":"none"}],"type":"block"}],"type":"module","variables":[{"name":"io.nickel","rtl":true,"value":"_io_nickel_wire"},{"name":"io.dime","rtl":true,"value":"_io_dime_wire"},{"name":"cycle","rtl":true,"value":"cycle"},{"name":"done","rtl":true,"value":"done"},{"name":"nickelInputs.0","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_0"},{"name":"nickelInputs.1","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_1"},{"name":"nickelInputs.2","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_2"},{"name":"nickelInputs.3","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_3"},{"name":"nickelInputs.4","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_4"},{"name":"nickelInputs.5","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_5"},{"name":"nickelInputs.6","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_6"},{"name":"nickelInputs.7","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_7"},{"name":"nickelInputs.8","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_8"},{"name":"nickelInputs.9","rtl":true,"value":"nickelInputs_9"},{"name":"dimeInputs.0","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_0"},{"name":"dimeInputs.1","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_1"},{"name":"dimeInputs.2","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_2"},{"name":"dimeInputs.3","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_3"},{"name":"dimeInputs.4","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_4"},{"name":"dimeInputs.5","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_5"},{"name":"dimeInputs.6","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_6"},{"name":"dimeInputs.7","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_7"},{"name":"dimeInputs.8","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_8"},{"name":"dimeInputs.9","rtl":true,"value":"dimeInputs_9"},{"name":"expected.0","rtl":true,"value":"expected_0"},{"name":"expected.1","rtl":true,"value":"expected_1"},{"name":"expected.2","rtl":true,"value":"expected_2"},{"name":"expected.3","rtl":true,"value":"expected_3"},{"name":"expected.4","rtl":true,"value":"expected_4"},{"name":"expected.5","rtl":true,"value":"expected_5"},{"name":"expected.6","rtl":true,"value":"expected_6"},{"name":"expected.7","rtl":true,"value":"expected_7"},{"name":"expected.8","rtl":true,"value":"expected_8"},{"name":"expected.9","rtl":true,"value":"expected_9"}]}],"top":"SimpleVendingMachineTester"}
```

## Remaining issues
While the demo works well, I’ve encountered several issues that’s outside the scope of this PR. I think I mentioned some of them in my hgdb presentation.

1. Incomplete/incorrect source location
As shown in the Firrtl file above, register `cycle` is declared in `Counter.scala`, which is not in the working folder [here](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel3/tree/master/src/test/scala/examples). In addition, all the filenames are also basenames, which makes it difficult to resolve during debugging, if there are conflicting names in the working directory.
2. Scoping information. So far it’s unclear to me how to faithfully recreate the local variables given the current information in firrtl, so the local variables in the debugger are empty for now. Maybe someone more knowledgeable can give me some pointers. In addition, if we're to support other front-end languages that already apply SSA prior to passing IR to circt, how to utilize such information is also an open question.

--------

Please let me know if you have any suggestions or questions. I can break this up into smaller PR if you deem it worthy to merge this feature into the upstream.
